name: Krishana Phoschem Limited
summary: Krishana Phoschem Limited manufactures and sells fertilizers, intermediate dyes, and other allied chemical products in India. The company offers benefited rock phosphate, single super phosphate (SSP), granulated single super phosphate (GSSP), H-acid, intermediate dyes, sulphuric acid, chloro sulphonic acid, liquid SO3, and other allied chemicals. The company's SSP and GSSP products are used as fertilizer for crop. It also engages in the contract manufacturing of chemicals. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Bhilwara, India.
